channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Embiid ejected after drawing 2 technicals in game against Wembanyama and Spurs
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers star Joel Embiid was ejected in the first half of Monday night’s game against San Antonio after drawing two technical fouls.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Bracy, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Danny DeVito recalls spilling Coke on floor while attending Blazers game in 1975
item.description: Beloved Hollywood celebrity Danny DeVito appeared on former NFL wide receiver Julian Edelman’s podcast “Games with Names” on Dec. 3, where he shared a story about a night out in Portland with Jack Nicholson while the actors were filming “One Flew Over the Cuckoo’s Nest” in January of 1975.
item.dc:creator: John Ross Ferrara, NewsNation

item.title: Sean Manaea to re-sign with Mets for $75 million over 3 years, AP source says
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Sean Manaea is set to return to the New York Mets on a $75 million, three-year contract, a person familiar with the agreement told The Associated Press. The person spoke to the AP on condition of anonymity Monday because the deal was subject to a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 49ers’ aftermath: Banks and Moore done for season, so is Trent Williams and maybe Dre Greenlaw
item.description: Aaron Banks, Jaylon Moore, Trent Williams and possibly Dre Greenlaw won't play in 49ers' last two games.
item.dc:creator: Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: Georgia turns to backup Stockton at quarterback in CFP quarterfinal; Beck has season-ending surgery
item.description: No. 2 Georgia is resting its national championship hopes on backup quarterback Gunner Stockton following Carson Beck's season-ending elbow surgery on Monday. Coach Kirby Smart said Monday that Georgia is preparing Stockton to start in the Sugar Bowl on Jan.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Archbishop Mitty stakes claim as top girls basketball team in U.S. with repeat tourney win
item.description: McKenna Woliczko named MVP after scoring 25 points against previously undefeated Ontario Christian as Mitty wins second consecutive Nike Tournament of Champions
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Shohei Ohtani wins 3rd AP Male Athlete of the Year award, tying Michael Jordan for 1 shy of record
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani is keeping elite company. The Japanese superstar caps 2024 by winning The Associated Press Male Athlete of the Year for the third time, tying him with basketball great Michael Jordan. He trails only four-time winners Lance Armstrong, Tiger Woods and LeBron James.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Houston Astros welcome 1B Christian Walker to team; say negotiations with Bregman stalled
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — The Astros welcomed first baseman Christian Walker to the team Monday, in one of two moves that almost certainly marks the end of Alex Bregman’s time in Houston.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NCAA appealing Pavia injunction as D-I board grants waiver to former JUCO players
item.description: The NCAA on Monday appealed the preliminary injunction granted by a U.S. federal judge giving Diego Pavia another year of eligibility even as the organization’s Division I board of directors granted a waiver allowing athletes in a similar situation as the Vanderbilt quarterback to play in 2025-26.
item.dc:creator: Teresa M. Walker, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Texas, Arizona State to meet in CFP clash of old vs. new Big 12 champs
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Texas won the Big 12 title in 2023 on its way out the door to the Southeastern Conference. It was still swinging open when Arizona State waltzed in and won the league title in its debut season.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jets' Aaron Rodgers reveals he has a girlfriend after mentioning exes in docuseries
item.description: New York Jets star quarterback Aaron Rodgers revealed he has a girlfriend during his latest appearance on ESPN's "The Pat McAfee Show.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Andrew McCutchen, confident he can be difference maker, returns to Pirates on $5M, 1-year deal
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Andrew McCutchen can sense the end of his baseball career coming. It's not quite here yet.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: No. 1 Oregon and No. 8 Ohio State gear up for rematch of thriller won by Ducks
item.description: Oregon and Ohio State have already produced one heck of a game this season. Now, the top-seeded Ducks (13-0) and No. 8 Buckeyes (11-2) are gearing up for a rematch more than 10 weeks later in a College Football Playoff quarterfinal game at the Rose Bowl on New Year's Day.
item.dc:creator: JOHN ZENOR, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: East Bay’s Sabrina Ionescu joins Unrivaled 3-on-3 league
item.description: Sabrina Ionescu won a WNBA title and an Olympic gold medal in 2024, will join new league that will start play in January
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: What to know if you want to follow the Buckeyes to the Rose Bowl
item.description: It will be a warm welcome for Ohio State fans traveling to Pasadena after a frigid December home game at The Shoe.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Beachy, NewsNation

item.title: Former NFL great Michael Vick introduced as Norfolk State’s football coach
item.description: NORFOLK, Va. (AP) — To shouts of “Coach” and “Let’s go Spartans,” Michael Vick was introduced Monday as Norfolk State’s football coach, a homecoming for the former NFL star and a splashy, attention-grabbing hire for a program that has struggled in recent years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Matt Petgrave, involved in play that led to Adam Johnson's death, asks for donations for legal costs
item.description: Hockey player Matt Petgrave has called the death of Adam Johnson “a tragic accident” in a public appeal for donations to his legal costs amid a police investigation.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers eliminated from NFC playoffs before game against Miami. Cowboys, Saints, Cardinals also out
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — The defending NFC champion San Francisco 49ers were eliminated from the playoffs before their game at Miami began on Sunday because of victories by Washington and the Los Angeles Rams.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nick Saban corrects Shane Gillis after comedian jokes coach oversaw cheating during storied Alabama tenure
item.description: The seven-time national championship coach did not take kindly to the suggestion or even joke that Alabama players received impermissible benefits under his watch.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles' CJ Gardner-Johnson flips off Commanders fans after ejection
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles defensive back C.J. Gardner-Johnson was seen flipping off Washington Commanders fans after he was ejected from the game Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Day 3: Winter Classic Basketball
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Palisade High School was buzzing on Day 3 of the Winter Classic as the Fruita Wildcats faced off against the Palmer Ridge Bears. Fruita entered the game riding high after a recent win against Ponderosa, while Palmer Ridge looked to snap a three-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: What to know for the Mizzou-Illinois Braggin' Rights game and how to watch
item.description: It's almost time for another Braggin' Rights matchup between two cross-state college basketball rivals: The Missouri Tigers and Illinois Fighting Illini.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Ryans, WGN 9

item.title: All eyes on Raymond James as Gasparilla Bowl kicks off Friday
item.description: When you hear the word "Gasparilla," you may think of pirates or pirate invasions. But on Friday, think football.
item.dc:creator: Alessandra Young, WFLA, NBC

item.title: San Diego FC releases 2025 regular season schedule
item.description: San Diego FC will be kicking off its first regular season match in franchise history in February against a rival city.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Cody Bellinger experienced World Series title with dad Clay at old Yankee Stadium
item.description: Bellinger won the 2019 NL MVP award with the Los Angeles Dodgers after hitting .305 with 47 homers, 115 RBIs and a 1.035 OPS.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Boys Basketball: La Jolla 55, Army-Navy 47
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys hoops in La Jolla with the Vikings hosting Army-Navy from Carlsbad. Great game that went right down to the wire, La Jolla won 52-47. Vikings were lead by Leo Hawkinson with 16. Warriors were lead by Yanler Ramos game high 26 points.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Boston's Sports Bar & Restaurant's 'Gather Your Herd' Sweepstakes
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — With the NFL playoffs quickly approaching, Boston’s Pizza is giving six lucky fans a chance to celebrate Denver’s postseason push at the ultimate football watch party. “We’ve got some really nice TVs in our bar,” said Brandon Cramer, Boston’s Pizza general manager.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Government funding deal opens door to move Washington Commanders stadium to DC
item.description: The Washington Commanders could soon be kicking off in the heart of the nation’s capital. The government funding deal unveiled by congressional negotiators Tuesday paved the way for moving the Commanders' stadium from Maryland to Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, NewsNation

item.title: White Sox change name of ballpark to Rate Field
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago White Sox have changed the name of Guaranteed Rate Field to Rate Field. The name change is because the sponsor of the ballpark, Guaranteed Rate, changed their name to Rate.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Guentzel scores in 7 consecutive games, 1 shy of matching the franchise record in Tuesday's win against Blue Jackets
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Nick Paul had a goal and two assists to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning to a 5-3 victory over the Columbus Blue Jackets. Jake Guentzel, Luke Glendening, Brayden Point and Mitchell Chaffee also scored for Tampa Bay, which has won five of six. Andrei Vasilevskiy finished with 28 saves.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Runnin' Utes roll past Florida A&M, 89-59
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's last home game of 2024 was a memorable one, as the Utes cruised past Florida A&M, 89-59. Mike Sharavjamts and Mason Madsen each scored 15 points off the bench to lead a balanced Utah attack. The Utes bench scored 57 points, while the starters scored 32.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Soccer: Our Lady of Peace 6, Patrick Henry 3
item.description: Holiday Jubilee tournament in girls soccer OLP facing off against Patrick Henry. OLP took home the 6-3 victory.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: NBA unveils new All-Star format featuring four-team tournament
item.description: The NBA 's All-Star Game is going to be an All-Star tournament this season, with the league announcing on Tuesday that it has finalized plans to use a different format for the upcoming midseason showcase in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9
